channel.title: Plugin on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Plugin on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: Introducing the Cluster API plugin for Headlamp
item.description:
Headlamp now has an alpha Cluster API plugin that adds visual management and debugging views for CAPI resources inside the UI. It covers cluster health, resource hierarchies, scaling, bootstrap config inspection, topology awareness, map view, and inline Prometheus metrics support.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: k8s: See your serverless: introducing the Headlamp plugin for Knative
item.description:
Headlamp now has a Knative plugin that adds integrated views and actions for Knative resources in the Kubernetes UI. It centralizes KService management, traffic splitting, autoscaling configuration, metrics, and related CRDs, with release 0.3.0-beta available.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog
